nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 5:15 AM (after all backup scripts complete)

nodes.name: SSH - Run Verification Script
nodes.notes: Executes backup verification via SSH to alpine-utility

nodes.name: SSH - Read JSON Health Report
nodes.notes: Reads JSON health report generated by verification script

nodes.name: Parse JSON Status
nodes.notes: Parses JSON report and determines if backups failed or are stale

nodes.name: Check If Failed
nodes.notes: Primary check based on JSON health report status. Triggers alert if overall_status != pass or report is stale (>26h old)

nodes.name: Send Failure Email
nodes.notes: Send detailed email if verification fails
